title: Brown Bricks With Minecrap
description: Mod based on the legendary video
body:
I love building with brown bricks in Minecrap!
![Genesis 1:1](https://i.ytimg.com/vi/KJyV0VvNJg4/maxresdefault.jpg)
This mod adds much needed brown brick to minecrap. Your life will never be the same again.

List of life improving assitions:
- Brown Bricks, Stairs, Slabs, and Walls!
- Inspector Bricks
- New paintings
- IPad (not free)

[BROWN BRICKS](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=7TZcW8wmmo4)
